title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Cox & Kings India

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Cox & Kings India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Hotel Manager with drive and ambition, Cox & Kings India in Allahabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Cox & Kings India:
Cox & Kings India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Opera PMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cox & Kings India!
